name: Moussaka #5
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------EGGPLANT----------------------------------
2 Eggplants, unpeeled
1/2 cup Melted butter or margarine
1/8 tsp Salt & pepper
--------------------------------CREAM SAUCE--------------------------------
2 tbsp Butter or margarine
2 tbsp Flour
MEAT SAUCE: Melt butter and saute onion. Add meat and garlic, stirring until brown. Add herbs and spices, then tomato sauce; bring to a boil. Reduce heat, simmer uncovered about 30 minutes. Just before assembling the casserole, mix bread crumbs into the sauce.
EGGPLANT: Halve eggplants lengthwise. Cut each half across into 1/2-inch slices. Place slices in bottom of broiler pan. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and brush with butter. Broil 4 inches from heat for 4 minutes on each side.
CREAM SAUCE: Melt butter, stir in flour, salt, and pepper. Gradually add milk. Bring to a boil, stirring until thick. Remove from heat. Beat a small amount of the cream mixture into eggs. Blend egg mixture into remaining sauce. Mix well and set aside.
TO ASSEMBLE: In a 2-quart shallow baking dish, layer half of the eggplant, overlapping slightly. Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of the combined cheeses. Pour meat sauce over eggplant. Sprinkle with another 2 tbsp of cheese. Layer remaining eggplant over top. Pour cream sauce over all. Sprinkle with remaining cheeses. Bake at 350 until brown and top is set, approximately 35-40 minutes.
This dish is very forgiving; eggplant haters won't even know what they're eating!
